description: Switched serde_json_serialize_profile to use simd-json (produces identical output, ~24% faster)

asi.hypothesis: Using simd-json for BlueskyProfile serialization instead of serde_json
asi.notes: simd-json produces byte-for-byte identical output to serde_json for BlueskyProfile. Already used for serialization in redis.rs and sqlite.rs.
